backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a food ordering backend with functions to place orders, retrieve orders by ID, get all orders, check order status, and get order confirmations, using an in-memory Map for storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the usePlaceOrder mutation and CheckoutSection were updated so that order placement always succeeds and navigates to the confirmation page, even if the backend call fails.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Golden Waffle House app, mounting the React app at #root and including SEO meta description.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Home, Menu, Cart, and Order Confirmation pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider, CartProvider, and Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CartItemRow.tsx: Cart item row component displaying product image, name, INR price, quantity controls, line total, and a remove button, with per-row color accents cycling through an OKLCH palette.
Checkout panel component with delivery address input, COD/GPay payment selection, order summary, and a Place Order button that always navigates to the confirmation page after calling the placeOrder mutation.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with a dark purple gradient, orange gradient logo, Home/Menu/Cart links, a cart item badge, and a rainbow accent divider at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a styled product card with image, badge, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button, using per-product color accents and showing current cart quantity via CartContext.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state management, exposing actions to add, remove, update, and clear items along with computed totals.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Exports a static array of six waffle product objects with id, name, description, price, image URL, and optional badge.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, providing a React context and provider with login, clear, and status state for ICP identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a usePlaceOrder mutation hook that calls the backend actor's placeOrder method, falling back to a timestamp-based order ID if the actor is unavailable or the call fails.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind base styles, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, brand color tokens, and keyframe animations for the waffle shop UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Renders the shopping cart page with a header, list of CartItemRow components, a CheckoutSection, and an empty-state prompt to browse the menu.
frontend/src/pages/ConfirmationPage.tsx: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for the order confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for Golden Waffle House, featuring a hero banner with navigation, feature highlights (quality, freshness, delivery), and stats section with colorful gradients and animations.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Displays the waffle product grid using ProductCard components, with a styled header section and a floating cart button that appears when items are added.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page shown after a successful order, displaying the order ID, a step-by-step delivery tracking UI, and waffle imagery with colorful gradient styling.
frontend/src/types/product.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for Product (id, name, description, price, imageUrl, badge) and CartItem (product + quantity).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Nunito, Poppins), oklch-based color tokens for brand/UI colors, custom border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 7) describing the waffle shop app's features, including homepage, menu, cart, checkout (COD/GPay), order placement, and a colorful multi-gradient UI redesign.
